passage:
Grand Opening Sale!

Come visit TechWorld's newest location at the City Center Mall!

We are offering 20% off all laptops and tablets this weekend only. The first 50 customers will receive a free screen protector.

Open: Saturday & Sunday, 9 AM - 9 PM.
Location: 123 Main St, 2nd Floor.

questions.explanation: The title says 'Grand Opening Sale' for a newest location.

questions.question_text: Who will get a free gift?
questions.explanation: The text says: 'The first 50 customers will receive a free screen protector'.
